info.title: Meridian Internal Account Service API
info.description: BIAN-compliant internal account operations for managing non-customer-facing accounts including clearing, nostro, vostro, holding, suspense, revenue, expense, and inventory accounts. Supports multi-asset instruments (fiat, energy, compute, carbon credits).

get.summary: ListInternalAccounts queries accounts with filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: accountTypeFilter
parameters.description:
account_type_filter returns only accounts of this type (optional).

 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED means the account type is unknown.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CLEARING: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CLEARING is for settlement and clearing operations.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_NOSTRO: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_NOSTRO is our account held at another bank (their books, our money).
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_VOSTRO: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_VOSTRO is another bank's account held at us (our books, their money).
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_HOLDING: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_HOLDING is for temporary holding of funds.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_SUSPENSE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_SUSPENSE is for unidentified or pending transactions.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_REVENUE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_REVENUE is for tracking revenue/income.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_EXPENSE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_EXPENSE is for tracking expenses/costs.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_INVENTORY: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_INVENTORY is for tracking non-cash assets (energy, commodities, etc.).

parameters.name: instrumentCodeFilter
parameters.description: instrument_code_filter returns only accounts for this instrument (optional).

parameters.name: statusFilter
parameters.description:
status_filter returns only accounts with this status (optional).

 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED means the status is unknown.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_ACTIVE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_ACTIVE means the account is operational and can process transactions.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_SUSPENDED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_SUSPENDED means the account is temporarily suspended.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_CLOSED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_CLOSED means the account is permanently closed.

parameters.name: pagination.pageSize
parameters.description: page_size is the number of items to return (default: 50, max: 1000).

parameters.name: pagination.pageToken
parameters.description: page_token is an opaque token for fetching the next page.

post.summary:
InitiateInternalAccount creates a new internal account.
The account is created in ACTIVE status.

get.summary: RetrieveInternalAccount fetches a single account by ID.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account_id identifies the account to retrieve.

patch.summary:
UpdateInternalAccount modifies account settings (partial update).
Cannot change account_type or instrument_code after creation.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account_id identifies the account to update.

get.summary:
GetBalance queries the current balance for an internal account.
The balance is retrieved from Position Keeping service (source of truth).
Internal Account does not store balance locally - Position Keeping maintains
the transaction log and computes balances per BIAN architecture.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
account_id identifies the account to query balance for (KSUID format).
Pattern accepts alphanumeric characters with hyphens and underscores to support
both KSUID identifiers and legacy account IDs.

post.summary:
ControlInternalAccount performs lifecycle state transitions.
Supports SUSPEND, ACTIVATE, and CLOSE actions with audit trail.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: account_id identifies the account to control.

bankId.description: bank_id is the unique identifier for the correspondent bank.

bankName.description: bank_name is the display name of the correspondent bank.

externalAccountRef.description: external_account_ref is the account reference at the correspondent bank.

swiftCode.description:
swift_code is the SWIFT/BIC code of the correspondent bank (optional).
Pattern validates BIC8 (8 chars) or BIC11 (11 chars) format.
Empty string is allowed for correspondent banks without SWIFT codes
(e.g., domestic correspondents, emerging market banks).

correspondentType.description: correspondent_type indicates whether this is a NOSTRO or VOSTRO relationship.

CorrespondentBankDetails.description:
CorrespondentBankDetails contains information about the correspondent bank
for NOSTRO and VOSTRO account types.

CorrespondentType.description:
CorrespondentType distinguishes between nostro and vostro relationships.

 - CORRESPONDENT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: CORRESPONDENT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED is the default value and should not be used.
 - CORRESPONDENT_TYPE_NOSTRO: CORRESPONDENT_TYPE_NOSTRO means our account at the correspondent bank.
 - CORRESPONDENT_TYPE_VOSTRO: CORRESPONDENT_TYPE_VOSTRO means their account at our bank.

amount.description:
amount is the decimal quantity as a string for precision (e.g., "1234.567890").
String format preserves arbitrary precision without floating-point errors.

instrumentCode.description: instrument_code is the unique identifier for the instrument (e.g., "USD", "KWH", "CARBON_CREDIT").

version.description: version is the instrument definition version for schema evolution.

attributes.description:
attributes contains additional metadata for this amount (e.g., batch_id, location, quality_grade).
Uses repeated instead of map to support deterministic poolability key generation.

validFrom.description: valid_from is when this amount becomes valid (optional, for time-bound assets).

validTo.description: valid_to is when this amount expires (optional, for time-bound assets).

source.description: source identifies the origin of this amount (e.g., "meter_reading", "manual_entry", "settlement").

InstrumentAmount.description:
InstrumentAmount represents a quantity of a specific instrument with optional attributes.
This is the universal representation for any asset type: currencies, energy, commodities, etc.

InternalAccountStatus.description:
InternalAccountStatus defines the lifecycle state of an internal account.

 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED means the status is unknown.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_ACTIVE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_ACTIVE means the account is operational and can process transactions.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_SUSPENDED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_SUSPENDED means the account is temporarily suspended.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_CLOSED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_STATUS_CLOSED means the account is permanently closed.

InternalAccountType.description:
InternalAccountType defines the type of internal account per BIAN v13.0.
Internal accounts are non-customer-facing accounts used for operational purposes.

 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED means the account type is unknown.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CLEARING: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CLEARING is for settlement and clearing operations.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_NOSTRO: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_NOSTRO is our account held at another bank (their books, our money).
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_VOSTRO: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_VOSTRO is another bank's account held at us (our books, their money).
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_HOLDING: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_HOLDING is for temporary holding of funds.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_SUSPENSE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_SUSPENSE is for unidentified or pending transactions.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_REVENUE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_REVENUE is for tracking revenue/income.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_EXPENSE: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_EXPENSE is for tracking expenses/costs.
 - INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_INVENTORY: INTERNAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_INVENTORY is for tracking non-cash assets (energy, commodities, etc.).

current_account.v1.ControlAction.description:
- CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED: CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED is the default value and should not be used
 - CONTROL_ACTION_FREEZE: CONTROL_ACTION_FREEZE temporarily suspends account operations (reversible)
Transitions: ACTIVE → FROZEN
 - CONTROL_ACTION_UNFREEZE: CONTROL_ACTION_UNFREEZE restores a frozen account to active status
Transitions: FROZEN → ACTIVE
 - CONTROL_ACTION_CLOSE: CONTROL_ACTION_CLOSE permanently closes the account (irreversible)
Transitions: ACTIVE or FROZEN → CLOSED
current_account.v1.ControlAction.title:
ControlAction defines the control operations that can be performed on an account
These are BIAN Control Record (CoCR) operations for account lifecycle management

financial_accounting.v1.ControlAction.description:
ControlAction defines the lifecycle control actions for financial booking logs.
These are BIAN control operations for administrative management of booking logs.

 - CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED: CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED means the action is unknown.
 - CONTROL_ACTION_SUSPEND: CONTROL_ACTION_SUSPEND temporarily suspends the booking log (transitions to FAILED/suspended).
 - CONTROL_ACTION_RESUME: CONTROL_ACTION_RESUME reactivates a suspended booking log (returns to PENDING).
 - CONTROL_ACTION_TERMINATE: CONTROL_ACTION_TERMINATE permanently ends the booking log lifecycle (transitions to CANCELLED).

internal_account.v1.ControlAction.description:
ControlAction defines the control operations for account lifecycle management.
These are BIAN Control Record (CoCR) operations.

 - CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED: CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED is the default value and should not be used.
 - CONTROL_ACTION_SUSPEND: CONTROL_ACTION_SUSPEND temporarily suspends account operations (reversible).
Transitions: ACTIVE -> SUSPENDED
 - CONTROL_ACTION_ACTIVATE: CONTROL_ACTION_ACTIVATE restores a suspended account to active status.
Transitions: SUSPENDED -> ACTIVE
 - CONTROL_ACTION_CLOSE: CONTROL_ACTION_CLOSE permanently closes the account (irreversible).
Transitions: ACTIVE or SUSPENDED -> CLOSED

party.v1.ControlAction.description:
ControlAction defines the lifecycle control actions for party management.

 - CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED: CONTROL_ACTION_UNSPECIFIED means the action is unknown.
 - CONTROL_ACTION_RESTRICT: CONTROL_ACTION_RESTRICT limits party access (e.g., pending KYC review).
 - CONTROL_ACTION_SUSPEND: CONTROL_ACTION_SUSPEND temporarily disables party operations.
 - CONTROL_ACTION_ACTIVATE: CONTROL_ACTION_ACTIVATE re-enables party operations.
 - CONTROL_ACTION_TERMINATE: CONTROL_ACTION_TERMINATE permanently ends the party relationship.
